title: 18 Sets Watercolours Paint Pack with Smooth Wood Brushes 8 Colours Washable Water Colours
features: 18 FULL WATERCOLOUR PAINT SETS 18 High Quality Individual Sets with Cases and 8 Vibrant Classic Colours Including Red, Green, Blue, Yellow, Orange, Violet, Black, Brown.
KID SAFE & WASHABLE All Color Swell Water Colours for kids contain Washable and ASTM compliant non-toxic paint that is perfect for kids age 3+, classrooms, students, parties, or adults painting.

BONUS WOOD BRUSHES 18 High Quality Wood Brushes Included in each set for Easy & Controlled Paint Application, mixing and blending paint colours for all creative art projects at home, school, crafting or in the classroom. EASY TO CLEAN Paint brushes washes out quickly the washable kids paint, maintaining their shape with repeated use.
BEST BULK VALUE Painting Supplies Set that is the Perfect Watercolours Bulk Paint Pack for your art and craft projects, classroom needs, school projects, and party favors or gift bags.
The Color Swell mission is to donate bulk colored pencils and other art supplies to kids in need, we couldn’t do this without PHENOMENAL CUSTOMER SERVICE.
